funding_relationship.notes: Provisional flows render with dashed stroke per status rules.

coordination.notes: Bidirectional; rendered as curved arc between member polities.

membership.notes: Members of intergovernmental bodies/committees connect to a shared floating node representing the body itself.

regulatory_authority.notes: Regulatory relationships shown only in the entity panel, not on map.

portfolio_membership.notes: Portfolio structure is shown in Relationship View, not on the map.

colour_tokens.financial: tokenised by client theme; semantic = "money flow"

status_inheritance: Connector status_flag inherits from underlying ux_edges_v41 row.
